expectations.text: References the existing feature-dev skill directly rather than answering generically.
expectations.evidence: The response says it inspected the current feature-dev skill in this repo and discusses the frontmatter, When Not To Use This Skill, and Light Track sections directly.

expectations.text: Avoids asking blocking clarifying questions for this well-specified task.
expectations.evidence: It states 'No blocking questions came up' in user notes and provides direct recommendations instead of pausing.

expectations.text: Proposes concrete description and body changes, including a scoped 'When not to use this skill' addition.
expectations.evidence: It proposes tightened frontmatter wording, a short When Not To Use This Skill section, and removing or rewriting Light Track.

expectations.text: Scales the workflow to the task instead of insisting on a full multi-phase approval process.
expectations.evidence: The output responds with a short direct change list and does not ask the user to go through discovery, architecture selection, or explicit approval.

claims.claim: The live repo already includes a narrowed frontmatter description and a When Not To Use This Skill section.
claims.evidence: This matches the current skills/feature-dev/SKILL.md content inspected by the run.

workarounds: Focused the root-cause fix on rewriting or removing Light Track.
